headline: Starbucks Builds Sovereign AI to Cut $400 Million in Software Costs
summary: Starbucks (SBUX) is building internal AI tools to replace Microsoft and IBM software, targeting $400 million in annual vendor spend and cutting $30 million from its tech budget.

raw.headline: Starbucks Builds Sovereign AI to Cut $400 Million in Software Costs
raw.summary: Starbucks (SBUX) is building internal AI tools to replace Microsoft and IBM software, targeting $400 million in annual vendor spend and cutting $30 million from its tech budget.

headline: Pushing the Edge: Super Micro Computer Reboots the AI Landscape
summary: Super Micro Computer launched a Kubernetes edge AI appliance with Red Hat and Portworx targeting sovereign AI demand, even as shares fell 30% and short interest rose to about 19% of its float.

raw.headline: Pushing the Edge: Super Micro Computer Reboots the AI Landscape
raw.summary: Super Micro Computer launched a Kubernetes edge AI appliance with Red Hat and Portworx targeting sovereign AI demand, even as shares fell 30% and short interest rose to about 19% of its float.
